scope_note: Engineering backlog derived from brainstorm artifacts. Interface/table names are placeholders to be mapped to the actual codebase.

core_data_entities.name: assessment_pack
core_data_entities.purpose: taxonomy + question bank + regression set for a topic

items.title: Freeze pre_context_v1.3 copy + option granularity

interfaces.name: AskUserQuestion
interfaces.contract: Must ask exactly 4 questions; allows options + free text (type something).

acceptance_tests: Template version is exactly pre_context_v1.3.
Exactly 4 questions; each question supports options and free text.
Does NOT ask for 2-4 week outcomes; does NOT ask accountability in these 4 questions.

items.title: Persist raw+parsed+provenance (non-blocking parse)

interfaces.name: profile.write_pre_context
interfaces.contract: Input: template_version, raw(q1-q4), parsed(optional), captured_at. Output: profile_version.

data_tables.name: profile_snapshot.data.pre_context
data_tables.change: Add raw+parsed+provenance; keep raw as source of truth.

acceptance_tests: If parsing fails, raw(q1-q4) is still persisted and the flow continues.
template_version and captured_at are always persisted.
profile_snapshot reflects the latest pre_context; profile_events contains the immutable capture event.

items.title: Preference summary + user correction path (evented)

interfaces.name: profile.read_preference_summary
interfaces.contract: Return a 1-3 sentence summary derived from snapshot.parsed.

interfaces.name: profile.apply_user_correction
interfaces.contract: User free text -> set one or more preference fields (FIELD_SET events).

data_tables.name: profile_snapshot.data.pre_context.parsed
data_tables.change: Allow user-corrected values; do not overwrite raw evidence.

acceptance_tests: User correction updates parsed fields but does not delete/overwrite raw evidence.
Corrections are fully traceable via events (path + value + actor=user).

items.title: Reuse policy: stale/drift/skip cooldown

interfaces.name: pre_context.gating
interfaces.contract: Decide ask vs reuse based on last_capture_at, drift signals, skip cooldown.

data_tables.name: profile_snapshot.data.pre_context.provenance
data_tables.change: Store captured_at for stale checks; store per-question skip markers if needed.

acceptance_tests: If last_capture_at older than pre_context_stale_days -> must ask 4 questions (allows 'no change').
If drift signal appears (user says preference mismatch) -> must ask 4 questions immediately.
If user answered 'skip' for a question -> do not ask that same question again within pre_context_skip_cooldown_days unless drift is explicit.

items.title: Metrics: completion/skip/correction

interfaces.name: telemetry.emit
interfaces.contract: Emit structured events for funnel analysis.

acceptance_tests: Metrics emitted include template_version and whether asked vs reused.
Skip/correction can be computed from telemetry and/or profile_events.

items.title: Define profile_snapshot schema

interfaces.name: profile.read_snapshot
interfaces.contract: Return the latest profile_snapshot by user_id.

data_tables.name: profile_snapshot
data_tables.change: Create/extend; includes pre_context, asserted/inferred skills, learning_profile (gradual fields).

acceptance_tests: Snapshot contains pre_context(raw+parsed+provenance) and skills(asserted/inferred).
Snapshot has monotonically increasing version and updated_at.

items.title: Define append-only profile_events types + payloads

interfaces.name: profile.append_event
interfaces.contract: Append-only write; returns new version.

data_tables.name: profile_events
data_tables.change: Create/extend: event_id, profile_id, version, type, actor, created_at, payload.

acceptance_tests: Events are immutable (no update/delete).
Every snapshot change is explainable by one or more events.

items.title: Implement fold/rebuild snapshot strategy

interfaces.name: profile.rebuild_snapshot
interfaces.contract: Input: profile_id + target_version(optional). Output: snapshot at version.

data_tables.name: profile_snapshot
data_tables.change: Rebuilt from events; may be recomputed in background.

acceptance_tests: Given a deterministic event stream, fold produces the same snapshot (idempotent).
Rollback to a version produces correct snapshot view without deleting history.

items.title: Implement inferred state machine + user confirm/reject

interfaces.name: profile.propose_inferred_skill
interfaces.contract: Create inferred skill with status=proposed + evidence.

interfaces.name: profile.user_confirm_inferred_skill
interfaces.contract: User explicit confirmation -> status=confirmed.

interfaces.name: profile.user_reject_inferred_skill
interfaces.contract: User explicit rejection -> status=rejected + reason_text(optional).

data_tables.name: profile_snapshot.data.skills.inferred
data_tables.change: Store status/provenance/evidence; keep history via superseded.

acceptance_tests: All inferred skills start as proposed; never auto-confirm.
Confirmed can only be produced from explicit user confirmation.
Rejected cannot be re-proposed until rejected_repropose_cooldown_days AND new evidence exists.

items.title: Implement rollback_to_version (event + rebuild)

interfaces.name: profile.rollback_to_version
interfaces.contract: Append ROLLBACK_TO_VERSION + rebuild snapshot view.

data_tables.name: profile_snapshot
data_tables.change: Rebuilt to a new version representing rollback view.

acceptance_tests: Rollback does not delete or mutate historical events.
After rollback, plan reads the rolled-back snapshot consistently.

items.title: Rubric + thresholds + stop rules (L1-L4, conservative)

interfaces.name: assessment.score_answer
interfaces.contract: Input: question + expected_subpoints + answer_text. Output: rubric_breakdown + confidence + decision(promote/hold/demote).

acceptance_tests: Max level change per question is 1.
Stop rule: 2 consecutive promote => conclude; 2 consecutive demote => drill down; max questions per topic = 6.
Explainability: output must include correct points, missing points, and decision rationale referencing rubric dimensions.

items.title: Coverage extraction from answer -> matched_subpoints

interfaces.name: assessment.extract_subpoints
interfaces.contract: Input: answer_text + taxonomy_subpoints. Output: matched_subpoints[] + evidence_snippets.

data_tables.name: assessment_pack.taxonomy
data_tables.change: Requires taxonomy_versioned subpoints for coverage ground truth.

acceptance_tests: coverage is computed as |matched_subpoints| / |expected_subpoints| per question.
matched_subpoints must include evidence snippet(s) for explainability.

items.title: Write assessment_* events + inferred proposed/updated

interfaces.name: assessment.run_session
interfaces.contract: Runs a topic assessment session; writes events for asked/answered/scored/level changes; returns summary.

data_tables.name: profile_events
data_tables.change: Append assessment_* events; append inferred skill proposed/updated with evidence.type=assessment_signal.

acceptance_tests: Assessment never emits INFERRED_SKILL_CONFIRMED automatically.
Assessment events include taxonomy_version for reproducibility.
Session summary includes strengths/gaps/next steps for plan.

items.title: Generic assessment pack generator (topic -> taxonomy/qbank/regression skeleton)

interfaces.name: assessment_pack.generate
interfaces.contract: Input: topic_name + scope -> outputs versioned taxonomy + question bank + regression skeleton.

interfaces.name: assessment_pack.get_or_create
interfaces.contract: Input: topic_id -> returns cached pack or generates new pack.

data_tables.name: assessment_pack_store
data_tables.change: Persist generated packs by topic_id + taxonomy_version.

acceptance_tests: Generated question bank has exactly 12 questions (3 per level) and each expected_subpoints exists in taxonomy.
Generated regression skeleton has 24 cases (6 per level) and is valid JSONL.
topic packs can be cached and reused to avoid regenerating each run.

items.title: Regression set harness + process to maintain

interfaces.name: regression.run
interfaces.contract: Run scoring/decision on JSONL cases; compare against expected thresholds/decisions; output diff.

data_tables.name: assessment_regression_sets
data_tables.change: Store/track JSONL cases per topic + taxonomy_version.

acceptance_tests: Any change to thresholds/extraction requires regression run.
Regression failure blocks release of scoring logic changes.

items.title: Dependency scan for KeywordDictionary.json

interfaces.name: repo.scan_dependency
interfaces.contract: Find reads/imports/references of KeywordDictionary.json.

acceptance_tests: All direct and indirect dependencies are listed with file paths and usage purpose.

items.title: Replace with taxonomy-based mechanisms

interfaces.name: taxonomy.lookup
interfaces.contract: Replace keyword dictionary usage with versioned taxonomy/subpoints retrieval.

data_tables.name: assessment_pack_store
data_tables.change: Becomes the source for subpoints/coverage instead of KeywordDictionary.

acceptance_tests: Coverage and inferred proposals work without KeywordDictionary.json.
taxonomy_version is persisted in events wherever needed.

items.title: Delete file + add regression test to prevent reintroduction

interfaces.name: ci.check_no_keyword_dictionary
interfaces.contract: Fail build if KeywordDictionary.json is reintroduced or referenced.

acceptance_tests: KeywordDictionary.json removed from repo/resources.
CI regression test fails on any reference.
